properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v2 v6 v6 v7

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Ah yeah Ah, the sound of heaven, ha ha ha Are you ready to jump for Jesus Come on now, we're gonna jump, we're gonna jump We're gonna jump, we're gonna jump, we're gonna jump We're gonna jump, we're gonna jump for Jesus, come on

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Jesus, You are my sole desire You light my soul on fire You lift my spirit higher Jump, jump, jump, jump for Jesus

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: You are my sole desire You light my soul on fire You lift my spirit higher Jump, jump, jump, jump for Jesus

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: You are my Friend and my Brother Above You there is no other You give us love for each other Jump, jump, jump, jump

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Aw yeah, come on now Mmm, oh yeah We're gonna jump, we're gonna jump, we're gonna jump We're gonna jump, we're gonna jump, we're gonna jump Come on now, jump, jump, jump, jump, jump for Jesus

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: You are my sole desire You light my soul on fire You lift my spirit higher, come on now Jump, jump, jump, jump, jump, jump, jump, jump, jump, jump

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Jesus, You are my sole desire You light my soul on fire You lift my spirit higher Jump, jump, jump, jump, jump, jump, jump, jump, jump, jump For Jesus
